key_claims.claim: [Our solution category] can operate efficiently at [extreme threshold] without [auxiliary system]
Eliminating [auxiliary systems] reduces total system weight by approximately 30%
Market for [extreme-condition-resilient product category] is growing at 18% CAGR through 2028

extracted_tables.description: [Performance metric] retention and [secondary capability] rates across [condition variable] range from [extreme threshold] to [baseline]

glossary.definition: Ability to operate [product unit] without [pre-conditioning step], even under [extreme condition]
glossary.context: Critical advantage for [target deployment scenario] where [auxiliary systems] add complexity, weight, and resource consumption

glossary.definition: The percentage of rated [performance metric] available at a given [condition value] compared to baseline conditions
glossary.context: Key performance metric for evaluating [product category] performance under [extreme condition]

glossary.definition: [Operation] rate expressed as a multiple of rated [capacity metric] (e.g. 1x = full cycle in 1 hour)
glossary.context: Higher rates under [extreme condition] indicate better [secondary capability]

glossary.definition: Electronic system that manages [core operation] and monitoring to ensure safe [product unit] operation
glossary.context: Specialized [control system] required for [our-solution-category] to handle unique [extreme-condition] characteristics

risk_notes.issue: Conflicting [secondary capability] rate specifications across sources
risk_notes.reason: Research paper claims [rate A] at [extreme threshold], but test data shows [rate B] maximum
risk_notes.recommendation: Verify with engineering team which specification is current and accurate

risk_notes.issue: Market growth projection is from a [year] report
risk_notes.reason: Data may be outdated; more recent projections may be available
risk_notes.recommendation: Search for newer market reports to validate growth figures

risk_notes.issue: No information found about long-term [longevity metric] under [extreme condition]
risk_notes.reason: Most research focuses on immediate performance, not [lifecycle metric] over years
risk_notes.recommendation: Consider including disclaimer about long-term performance data availability

key_findings: [Target deployment scenario] requires [resource range] continuous [output] with [duration range] backup capability
Conventional [product category] loses 60-70% [performance metric] below [moderate threshold] without [auxiliary system]
[Auxiliary systems] consume 15-30% of total [deployment unit] [resource] in [extreme condition]
[Our solution category] reduces total cost of ownership (TCO) by 20-35% over [N]-year lifecycle

extraction_notes: Excel file contained 3 sheets; processed all successfully
PDF certification report had some text quality issues on pages 8-9 but critical data extracted
Technical whitepaper included several charts that could not be extracted as text; noted in figures list
